calibration_configs_record.confirmatory_contract_json: {"alpha":0.05,"alternative":"two-sided","candidate_order_balance":{"A_then_B":5,"B_then_A":5},"confidence_interval":"two-sided-95-percent-Student-t-interval-on-10-paired-differences","confidence_interval_role":"reported-effect-uncertainty-not-a-second-winner-gate","confidence_level":0.95,"confirmatory_contract_version":"sc8-confirmatory-v1","decision":"p-value-strictly-less-than-0.05-selects-the-sign-of-the-effect; otherwise-statistical-tie","early_stopping":false,"effect_estimate":"mean(candidate-A-minus-candidate-B-paired-battery-score)","enumeration_count":1024,"extreme_comparison":"absolute-permuted-mean-greater-than-or-equal-to-absolute-observed-mean","fresh_pairs_required":10,"incomplete_pair_policy":"retain-interrupted-evidence-but-do-not-count; repeat-the-same-pair-index-until-complete","minimum_attainable_two_sided_p":0.001953125,"numerical_policy":{"permutation_extreme_comparison_tolerance_points":1e-12,"purpose":"Inclusive extremeness comparison guard only; it does not change score equality, alpha, or practical significance."},"order_seed_inputs":["confirmatory_contract_version","profile_id","cycle_id","phase","sorted_candidate_edpi_pair"],"order_sequence":["A_then_B","B_then_A","B_then_A","A_then_B","A_then_B","B_then_A","B_then_A","A_then_B","A_then_B","B_then_A"],"p_value_correction":"none-exhaustive-enumeration-includes-observed-assignment","pairing":"same-four-mode-order-and-condition-seeds-within-pair","power_claim":"none; fixed-n contract prioritizes exact-test resolution, balanced order, and bounded operator burden","reuse_exploratory_data":false,"t_critical_df9":2.2621571628540993,"test":"exact-two-sided-paired-sign-flip-randomization-test-on-mean-score-difference","unit":"paired-complete-protocol-battery-score","zero_differences":"retain"}

component_aggregation.flick_close_reaction: mean-target-visible-to-click-or-timeout; timeout contributes 1500 ms and clamps to zero utility
component_aggregation.flick_far_reaction: mean-movement-onset-to-click travel time; missing onset contributes 1500 ms for scoring while raw travel time remains null

production_safeguards: Hardware DPI and current in-game sensitivity remain validated user inputs.
Configured polling rate is user-entered supporting metadata.
Actual raw-event cadence is measured and stored per session.
Duplicate or reversed timestamps are rejected.
The nominal cadence must remain the modal interval class.
Raw evidence is preserved and resampling never bridges detected gaps.
limitations.scientific_limitation: This waiver does not convert either failed strict confirmation into a statistical pass and does not claim universal 1000 Hz physical delivery. Windows WM_INPUT receipt bursts remain visible diagnostics.
